## AdminHtmlPatternId type

Stable identifiers for built-in HTML patterns.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AdminHtmlPatternId = 'alert' | 'badge' | 'button' | 'card' | 'empty-state' | 'modal' | 'progress' | 'status-indicator' | 'table' | 'tabs' | 'toast';
```
